results.ai_summary: Your training demonstrates a well-structured approach with 82% of volume dedicated to aerobic development, supporting sustainable fitness gains. Weekly mileage averages 46.0 km with peak weeks reaching 54.0 km, indicating disciplined periodization and progression management. Recovery protocols are effectively integrated, as evidenced by your heart rate drift patterns and consistent long run execution. This balanced methodology positions your training for continued performance improvement while maintaining injury prevention standards.
